अनु榀ाि瀉तधारी 灹ािधकारी, चाय बोड榁 । अनु榀ि瀉त अनु榀ि瀉त अनु榀ि瀉त अनु榀ि瀉त के िलए आवेदन के िलए आवेदन के िलए आवेदन के िलए आवेदन 1. आवेदक का नाम (बड़े अ楹र犘 म犆) (भागीदारी संब獳 के मामले म犆 सभी भागीदार犘 का नाम 琈दया जाना चािहए) ............................................................................................................................................ 2. पता ............................................................................................................................................. 3. 灹योजन िजसके िलए अनु榀ि瀉त अपेि楹त है – िनया榁त, आयात, िब灙琉, खरीद अथवा चाय अपिश瀠ट का 瀡टॅाक रखना ............................................................................................................................................. 4. िनया榁त, आयात, िब灙琉, खरीद अथवा चाय अपिश瀠ट का 瀡टॅाक रखने का कारण ............................................... ............................................................................................................................................. 5. अगले तीन कैल犆डर वष猀 के दौरान खरीदने (आयात सिहत), बेचे जाने, 瀡टॉक म犆 रखने, िनया榁त 琈कए जाने या केफ琉न अथवा इं瀡टेट टी अथवा जैव पोषक犘 अथवा जैव उव榁रक के िविनमा榁ण के िलए उपयोग 琈कए जाने के िलए 灹瀡तािवत चाय अपिश瀠ट क琉 मा灴ा..................................................................................................................... चाय अपिश瀠ट क琉 मा灴ा (琈क灡ा म犆) वष榁 2..... 2.... 2.... खरीद, उ瀆भूत, आयाितत बेची गई 瀡टॉक म犆 रखी गई िनया榁त क琉 गई कॅफ琉न अथवा इं瀡टेट टी अथवा जैव – पोषक अथवा जैव उव榁रक犘 के िलए उपयोग क琉 गई 6. (क) य琈द आवेदक एक िविनमा榁ता है तो रिज瀡灩ीकरण 灹माणप灴 सं. के साथ िविनमा榁ण इकाई का पता, जहां चाय का भ瀃डारण होना है, उपद琔शत 琈कया जाना चािहए । (ख) य琈द आवेदक भा瀃डागार का 瀡वामी है तो, भा瀃डागार इकाई का पता एवं अनु榀ि瀉त सं榐या, जहां भ瀃डारण, सफाई, सि瀓म炈ण अथवा पै琒कग क琉 जाती है, उपद琔शत 琈कया जाना चािहए । 7. आवेदन क琉 तारीख को 瀡टॉक म犆 रखी चाय अपिश瀠ट क琉 मा灴ा .................琈क灡ा । -- 2 of 5 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(ii)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 3 8. उस 瀡थान का 瀑यौरा जहां चाय अपिश瀠ट का भंडारण 琈कया जाना 灹瀡तािवत है । पता 榉या गोदाम अथवा भंडारण क琉 जगह पर ताला लगेगा 榉या भ瀃डारण 瀡थल का उपयोग केवल चाय अपिश瀠ट का भंडारण करने के िलए 琈कया जाएगा म犉/हम एत獵ारा घोषणा करता 牤ं / करते ह犉 琈क य琈द चाय अपिश瀠ट (िनयं灴ण) आदेश, 1959 के ख瀃ड 6 के उप ख瀃ड (2) म犆 ऊपर उि瀖लिखत 灹योजन犘 के िलए मुझे/हम犆 अनु榀ापन 灹ािधकारी 獧ारा अनु榀ापन 琈दया जाता है / 琈दए जाते ह犉 तो म犉/हम अनु榀ि瀉त के िनबंधन एवं शत猀 का पालन क牲ंगा/कर犆गे । तारीख तारीख तारीख तारीख आवेदक के ह瀡ता आवेदक के ह瀡ता आवेदक के ह瀡ता आवेदक के ह瀡ता楹र .......... 楹र .......... 楹र .......... 楹र .......... 瀡प 瀡प 瀡प 瀡प瀠टी 瀠टी 瀠टी 瀠टीकरण 琇ट瀉प करण 琇ट瀉प करण 琇ट瀉प करण 琇ट瀉पण ण ण ण :- यह आवेदन 瀘यापार के 瀡व瀄वधारी, अथवा फम榁 के मामले म犆 琈कसी एक 灹ािधकृत भागीदार 獧ारा; अथवा 琐हदू अिवभािजत कुटु瀓ब के कारबार के मामले म犆 कुटु瀓ब के क瀄ता榁 獧ारा; अथवा कंपनी के मामले म犆 कारबार का 灹बंधन करने वाले िनदेशक, 灹बंधन एज犆ट अथवा मु榐य अिधकारी 獧ारा ह瀡ता楹琇रत होना चािहए ।”। [फा. सं. टी –––– 12019/1/2016-बागान(क)] संतोष कुमार सांरगी, संयु榉त सिचव 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉पण ण ण ण :::: मूल िनयम, भारत के राजप灴, असाधारण, भाग II, खंड – 3, उप खंड (ii) म犆 सा.का. िन. सं榐या 354 तारीख 18.3.1959 獧ारा 灹कािशत 琈कए गए थे और प瀙चा瀄वत牸 संशोधन िन瀓निलिखत अिधसूचना猒 獧ारा 琈कए गए - (1) सा. का. िन. 848, तारीख 22.6.1961; (2) सा. का. िन. 1746, तारीख 14.11.1962; (3) सा. का. िन. 235, तारीख 04.02.1964; (4) सा. का. िन. 457, तारीख 03.04.1975; (5) सा. का. िन. 507, तारीख 24.3.1979; (6) सा. का. िन. 1318, तारीख 03.11.1979; (7) सा. का. िन. 763(अ), तारीख 23.12.1998; (8) सा. का. िन. 629 (अ), तारीख 31.8.2001; (9) सा. का. िन. 167 (अ), तारीख 5.3.2002; और (10) का. आ. 3320 (अ), तारीख 25.10.2016 । MINISTRY OF COMMERCE AND INDUSTRY (Department of Commerce) ORDER New Delhi, the 20th August, 2018 S.O. 4028(E).––In exercise of the power conferred by sub-sections (3) and (5) of section 30 of the Tea Act, 1953 (29 of 1953), the Central Government hereby makes the following amendments further to amend the Tea Waste (Control) Order, 1959, namely:— 1. Short Title and Commencement.—(1) This Order may be called the Tea Waste (Control) Amendment Order, 2018. (2) It shall come into force on the date of its publication in the Official Gazette. -- 3 of 5 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] 2. In the Tea Waste (Control) Order, 1959, (hereinafter referred to as the said Order), in clause 8, in sub-clause (1), for the words, figures and letters “up to the 31st December next following”, the words, figures and letters “upto the 31st December of the third year following the year in which it is renewed” shall be substituted. 3. In the said Order, in clause 18, for the words “shall be one Hundred Rupees and for its renewal Fifty Rupees”, the words “or renewal thereof shall be rupees three thousand three hundred” shall be substituted. 4. In the said Order, for Form A, the following Form shall be substituted, namely:- “FORM A Form of application for licence (See clause 5) To; The Licensing Authority, Tea Board. Application for Licence 1. Name of the Applicant (in block letters) (in case of a partnership concern the names of all partners should be given) ..……………………………………………………………………………………. 2. Address : ……………………………………………………………………………………………… 3. Purpose for which licence is required -- Export, import, sale, purchase or holding in stock of tea waste ………………………….………………………………………………………………………… 4. Reason for Export, import, sale, purchase or holding in stock of tea waste …………………… ………………………………………………………………………………………………………….. 5. Quantities of tea waste proposed to be purchased (including import), sold, held in stock, exported or utilised for manufacture of caffeine or instant tea or bio-nutrient or bio-fertilizer during next three calendar years …………………………………………………………………………………………... Quantity of Tea Waste (in kg.) Year 2…. 2….. 2…. Purchased/accrued/imported Sold Held in stock Exported Utilised for manufacture of caffeine or instant tea or bio-nutrient or bio-fertilizer 6. (a) If the applicant is a manufacturer, the address of the manufacturing unit with Registration Certificate Number where tea is stored should be indicated. (b) If the applicant is warehouse owner, the address of the warehouse unit with Licence No. where storing, cleaning, blending or packaging is done should be indicated. 7. Quantity of Tea Waste held in stock on the date of application. _____________________kilograms. -- 4 of 5 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(ii)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 5 8. Details of the place at which tea waste is proposed to be stored. Address Whether the godown or place of storage will be kept under lock Whether storage space will be utilised for storing tea waste only I/We hereby declare that if a licence is/are granted to me/us by the Licensing Authority for the above mentioned purpose in terms of sub-clause (2) of clause 6 of the Tea Waste (Control) Order, 1959, I/We shall abide by the terms and conditions of the licence. Date................ Signature of the applicant........... Explanatory Note :This application should be signed by the proprietor of the business, or in the case of a firm, by one of the authorised partners; or in the case of a business of a Hindu undivided family, by the Karta of the family; or in the case of a company, by the Director, Managing Agent or principal officer managing the business.”. [F. No. T-12019/1/2016-Plant(A)] SANTOSH KUMAR SARANGI, Jt. Secy. Note : The principal order was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub- section (ii) vide notification number G.S.R. 354, dated the 18th March, 1959 and subsequently amended vide following notifications - (1) G.S.R. 848, dated the 22nd June, 1961; (2) G.S.R. 1746, dated the 14th November, 1962; (3) G.S.R. 235, dated the 4th February, 1964; (4) G.S.R. 457, dated the 3rd April, 1975; (5) G.S.R. 507, dated the 24th March, 1979; (6) G.S.R. 1318, dated the 3rd November, 1979; (7) G.S.R. 763(E), dated the 23rd December, 1998; (8) G.S.R. 629(E), dated the 31st August, 2001; (9) G.S.R. 167(E), dated the 5th March, 2002; and (10) S.O. 3320(E), dated the 25th October, 2016.
